mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate above 8% signals weakening labor market conditions that reduce corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand and investment, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 3-year window or 60-day returns in co-expansion periods are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production signals robust supply-side capacity utilization, reducing inflationary pressures and enabling positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days via improved market risk appetite.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 70%+ of instances with rising INDPRO.

mechanism_narrative: A 20-day average federal funds rate above 2% signals monetary tightening that increases equity discount rates, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances with FEDFUNDS above 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payroll employment and rising unemployment rate indicates labor market imbalance, creating mixed signals that drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through heightened market uncertainty.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 3-year window or 60-day returns in co-contraction periods are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 20-day average real sales and services figure above 380 billion dollars signals strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through improved corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 70%+ of instances with RSAFS above 380000.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in inflation above 2% combined with rising federal funds rates signals aggressive monetary policy tightening, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through higher discount rates and reduced risk appetite.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances with both CPIAUCSL > 2% and FEDFUNDS > 1.5%.
